objective: Build operational stories so Alpha can explain selected periods as ordered milestones, distinguish monitoring noise-review candidates from incident-related signals, report user impact evidence, and classify responsibility as INHOUSE, ISP, EXTERNAL, or UNKNOWN.
next_actions: Open docs/build-on-alpha-intelligence.md and create the internal Alpha Knowledge Expert
Upload the eight generated Markdown documents from output/alpha-knowledge-package only after confirming validation_report.status=PASS
Create the Alpha Super Agent, attach the Expert, enable Inspect Mode, and execute the documented validation prompts
constraints: Do not build a local dashboard, database, or custom chat application
Do not describe raw alerts as confirmed incidents
Treat correlation as investigation context, not proof of RCA or user impact
Require site, overlapping time window, and issue relevance before correlating a ticket
Compute statistics deterministically in Python rather than relying on RAG counting
Treat master-data rows as authoritative only when review_status=CONFIRMED
Keep the Alpha Super Agent read-only
Do not upload a generated package into Alpha unless validation_report.status=PASS
